title: Gourmet Crispy Uruguayan Chimichurri-Flavored Herb Bake
description: A crispy, flavorful Uruguayan dish baked to perfection with fast-acting yeast and a hint of chimichurri. Perfect for low-calorie meal prep!
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C) with a baking stone or baking sheet inside.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, and salt.
Add the olive oil, chimichurri sauce, parsley, oregano, garlic powder, and black pepper to the bowl.
Gradually add the water to the bowl and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough on the preheated baking stone or baking sheet and shape into a 12-inch round loaf.
Dust the loaf with chopped cilantro and cover with a clean towel.
Bake the loaf for 20-22 minutes, or until it is golden brown and crispy on the outside.
Remove the loaf from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes.
Transfer the loaf to a serving plate and brush with additional chimichurri sauce, if desired.
Slice the loaf and serve immediately.
